{{Quote|But what will the citizens say when we start blasting their neighbor's houses? Won't there be political ramifications?|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Braedic Ekirk|Ekirk]]|<ref name="MIoLI">{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66958|text="Move It or Lose It"|int=Move It or Lose It}}</ref>}}
[[File:DemoPilot.jpg|thumb|left|175px|A G.V.B.D.M. pilot]]
The '''Galactic Vacant Building Demolishing Movement''', or '''G.V.B.D.M.''' for short, was a civil movement conceived by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Braedic Ekirk]]. They would spot abandoned buildings and report their location to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] so they could be demolished. The G.V.B.D.M. employed pilots from the [[Hidden Daggers]] to demolish the abandoned homes. These pilots wore red [[Reinforced Insulated Sheath armor|R.I.S. armor]] helmets and flew [[Variable Altitude Assault Transport/enforcement|VAAT/e's]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Galactic Vacant Building Demolishing Movement is mentioned in ''[[Move It or Lose It]]'', a small [[in-universe]] introduction to the House Pack-Up operation in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
